data.title: Dow launches Transform to Outperform for $2 billion Op. EBITDA improvement, streamlining processes, targeting growth.
data.description: With a focused goal of achieving a minimum of $2 billion in operational EBITDA enhancement in the near future, efforts are underway to significantly simplify the Company's operational framework, streamline processes, reduce costs, and modernize customer service delivery. The anticipated benefits from these actions are projected to contribute positively to earnings levels by 2025 and align with Dow's previous strategies.

data.title: EVA Live debuts on Nasdaq with GOAI, drawing strong attention for its A.I. technology in a $500B ad industry.
data.description: Los Angeles-based EVA Live, Inc. (referred to as "EVA" or the "Company"), commenced trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market with the ticker symbol GOAI on January 29, 2026. The debut received notable focus from both the market and media, showcasing an increased interest in the company's performance and growth potential.

data.title: Hong Kong plans to release HK$1.5B in infrastructure bonds linked to HONIA. Tender on Feb 4 by HKMA to raise funds for projects.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has revealed a tender scheduled for February 4 for floating rate notes linked to the overnight index average. The funds raised from this issuance will go towards infrastructure projects in the region. This initiative aims to support the development of crucial infrastructure and stimulate economic growth. This move by the HKMA signifies a commitment to investing in vital projects to bolster the economy.

data.title: SAP stock fell as CFO acknowledges Cloud slowdown worse than expected with revenue rising to 9.68 billion euros.
data.description: German software giant SAP SE's stock dropped after reporting mixed fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results. Revenue grew 3% YoY to 9.68 billion euros, with non-IFRS EPS up 16% YoY to 1.62 euros. Quarterly earnings in USD were $1.89 per share, beating estimates, while revenue at $11.27 billion missed expectations of $11.46 billion. IFRS operating profit rose 27% YoY, non-IFRS operating profit increased 16% YoY, and operating cash flow was at 1.30 billion euros, with free cash flow at 1.03 billion euros. The cloud backlog was at 21.05 billion euros, up 16% YoY, and up 25% YoY in constant currencies, impacted by transformational deals and termination clauses. SAP CFO mentioned a sharper slowdown than expected.

data.title: SunCoke Energy (NYSE: SXC) to announce Q4 2025 earnings and 2026 guidance on Feb 17, 2026, at 11:00 am ET. Live webcast available.
data.description: SunCoke Energy, Inc. (SXC) intends to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and provide guidance for 2026 on February 17, 2026. This information will be disclosed before the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will conduct its quarterly earnings call at 11:00 am ET on the same day. For those interested, the conference call can be accessed live at the following link: https://event.choruscall.com/mediaframe/webcast.html?webcastid=6AQEfKx3 and will be available for replay on the Investors section of the SunCoke Energy website, www.suncoke.com.

data.title: Group 1 Automotive Q4 earnings missed estimates by -9.0%, EPS $8.49 vs. estimate $9.37. Revenue up $34M from previous year.
data.description: The Q4 earnings report for Group 1 Automotive (NYSE: GPI) was released on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 05:01 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -9.0%, with an EPS of $8.49 compared to the expected $9.37. Revenue showed an increase of $34.00 million from the previous year. This continues a trend of the company missing EPS estimates in previous quarters. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Southside Bancshares Q4 earnings missed estimates by -11%, EPS at $0.7 vs $0.79. Revenue down $3.16M from last year.
data.description: Southside Bancshares (NYSE: SBSI) released their Q4 earnings report on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 05:45 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -11.0%, posting an EPS of $0.7 compared to the expected $0.79. Revenue decreased by $3.16 million from the previous year. For additional details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sei Network issues 2026 Validator Guide as Solana's validators decrease by 65%. Key info for stakers on choosing trustworthy validators.
data.description: Sei has released detailed guidelines for selecting validators, coinciding with a 65% decline in Solana's validator count. This underscores the importance for stakers to understand how to choose trustworthy validators. For more information, click on the link provided.

data.title: Metaplanet secures $137M for Bitcoin purchase and debt repayment in capital strategy move.
data.description: Metaplanet announced that the funds raised will go towards purchasing Bitcoin, investing in its Bitcoin income business, and making partial repayments on its debts as part of its capital strategy.
